chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1620 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.6942/2018. 2. For hearing of main case. 13.02.2025 Mr. Naeem Suleman, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. M. Siddique, advocate holding brief for Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. At the very outset learned counsel for the petitioner and learned counsel for the respondent submit that this petition was though filed alongwith another et of petitions including CP D 7159 of 2017 but was not decided, whereas, the said petitions and other connected petitions were decided on 07.02.2018 in the case reported as Premier Systems (Pvt.) Ltd. & Others v. Federation of Pakistan & Others (2018 PTD 861). The petitioner’s counsel has also placed on record copy of dated 30.10.2024 passed in CP D 4045 of 2018 and other connected matters. In view of the above, this petition is allowed for the reasons so assigned in the case of premier Systems (Pvt.) (supra). Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
